/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAssetsTools.so -o libAssetsTools.so CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetBundleFileFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetBundleFileTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetsFileFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetsFileReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetsFileTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetsReplacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/AssetTypeClass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/BundleReplacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/ClassDatabaseFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/EngineVersion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/ResourceManagerFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/dllmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools.dir/TextureFileFormat.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build ../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a ../libCompression/liblibCompression.a ../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a ../CrnlibWrap/libCrnlibWrapLegacy.so ../CrnlibWrap/libCrnlibWrapUnity.so ../_deps/libsquish-build/libsquishd.a ../libispc_texcomp.so ../libtexgenpack.so ../_deps/astcenc-build/Source/libastcenc-sse4.1-static.a
